chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-263 of 2024 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Pakistan Mobile Communication Ltd through Mr.Imdad Ali Sahito, Advocate. Nemo. Respondent No.1: Learned Couse of Commissioner Workmen’s Compensation & Authority, under the Pament of Wages Act, 2015. Nemo. Respondent No.2: Ramchand s/o Malhoo, Through Mr.Ali Akbar, Advocate Respondent No.3: M/s National Spinning Mills Through Mr.Ayaz Hussain Chandio, Advocate. Nemo. Date of hearing: 05.11.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
